characters.description: The Ageless: Ghosts age under normal circumstances, and their apparent age seems to reflect their mindset. That said, they still seem to be immune to theeffectsof aging.Desiree was clearly stated to have died of old age. However, after her death, she has remained an outwardly youthful ghost for centuries.Sidney Poindexter, a teen who died inThe '50s, clearly hasn't age since his demise.Box Lunch, daughter of the Box Ghost and the Lunch Lady, is a young child despite being born a ghost but doesn't appear to mature beyond that. Desiree was clearly stated to have died of old age. However, after her death, she has remained an outwardly youthful ghost for centuries. Sidney Poindexter, a teen who died inThe '50s, clearly hasn't age since his demise. Box Lunch, daughter of the Box Ghost and the Lunch Lady, is a young child despite being born a ghost but doesn't appear to mature beyond that. Alien Blood: Apparently, ghosts (and half ghosts in their ghost forms) bleed glowing green ectoplasm, as shown in "Fright Knight" whenDanny gets a cut by a blade.◊
